text.title: Hacker News Launch Strategy Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Hacker News Launch Strategy end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: build-reputation
step.action: Comment authentically for ≥4 weeks; aim karma ≥50.

step.name: draft-title-and-demo
step.action: Substance-first title; demo URL without auth wall.

step.name: pick-post-window
step.action: Pick Tue-Thu 8-10 AM ET; block 48h after.

step.name: post-and-engage
step.action: Post; reply to every comment for 48h.
